title: City Bans
description: Repeated smuggling offenses can result in temporary expulsion or bans from cities in your network. As you build more infrastructure and invest in a city, it becomes increasingly risky to smuggle - you have more to lose.
definition-of-done: Ban system for repeated offenses. Bans prevent trade for set duration. Investment level affects ban severity. Ban status visible in city management.
testing-plan: Verify bans trigger on repeat offenses. Test ban prevents trade. Verify investment affects severity. Test ban status display.
todos: Design ban status in city management
